creator: fbsdbugs4@sentry.org
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #13)

No luck here with:

* FreeBSD 13.4-STABLE #1 stable/13-1ec3289e4-dirty: Fri Sep  6 13:26:30 AEST 2024

* FreeBSD clang version 18.1.6 (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-18.1.6-0-g1118c2e05e67)
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd13.4
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin

Unless I add LDFLAGS=        -Wl,-allow-shlib-undefined to the Makefile
